basic_details.job_title: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Walk in for 06 Stenographer, Typist and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: The National Institute for the Empowerment of Persons with Intellectual Disabilities (NIEPID), Secunderabad has released Employment Notice No. 03/2026 inviting applications for regular, contractual, and guest faculty/staff positions across its headquarters and regional centres. A total of 6 regular posts and multiple contractual and CDEIC posts are open. The last date to apply is 01 August 2026. Walk-in interviews for guest faculty empanelment were held from 23 June to 06 July 2026.

application_fee.details: The fee must be submitted as a non-refundable Demand Draft drawn on any Nationalized Bank in favour of "Director, NIEPID, Secunderabad". Candidates must write their name and the post applied for on the back of the DD. Applications without the required DD will not be considered. | Candidates applying for more than one post must submit separate application forms and separate DDs for each post.

qualification.details: Candidates wondering about eligibility can note that each post carries specific educational and experience requirements. All qualifications must be from a recognized Board or University, and experience must be post-qualification. | 1. Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology (Level-10) | Two-year M.Phil. in Clinical/Rehabilitation Psychology from a reputed institution (NIMHANS, CIP Ranchi, NIEPID, etc.) OR Ph.D. in Child/Experimental/Community/Educational Psychology Registered with MCI/RCI Minimum 2 years teaching/research experience Age Limit: 45 years | 2. Stenographer (Level-4) | SSLC/Matriculation or equivalent Typewriting (English) - 40 wpm; Shorthand (English) - 100 wpm Desirable: 3 years experience; Graduate with English Age Limit: 28 years | 3. LDC/Typist (Level-2) | 12th class or equivalent from a recognized Board/University Typing: 35 wpm (English) or 30 wpm (Hindi) on computer; OR 30 wpm (English) or 25 wpm (Hindi) on manual typewriter Age Limit: 27 years | 4. Physiotherapy Assistant (Level-2) | Bachelor of Physiotherapy from a recognized college/university 1 year experience in the field of Disability Rehabilitation Age Limit: 35 years | Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/PH/Ex-Servicemen categories for regular posts. | Assistant Professor in Pediatrics: MD in Pediatrics + 4 years teaching/research experience (Max Age: 56 years) Assistant Professor (PMR): MBBS + PG Degree/Diploma in PMR/Pediatrics (MCI/RCI recognised) + 2 years teaching/research (Max Age: 56 years) Assistant Professor (Speech): PG Degree in Speech and Hearing (RCI recognised) + 5 years experience (Max Age: 56 years) Assistant Professor (Clinical Psychology): M.Phil. in Clinical/Rehabilitation Psychology (RCI recognised) + 5 years experience (Max Age: 56 years) Lecturer (Occupational Therapy): Master's in Occupational Therapy + 3 years experience (Max Age: 56 years)

salary_details.details: Candidates selected for regular posts will be governed by the New Pension Scheme (NPS) introduced by the Government of India w.e.f. 01.01.2004. | Fixed consolidated monthly remuneration is paid as per the contract. No additional allowances are admissible for contractual positions.

selection_process: NIEPID follows a structured selection process depending on post level and category.
Screening of applications by a duly constituted Screening Committee Shortlisting (minimum 1:5 ratio per vacancy) Written Examination (if more than 20 applications received) Personal Interview
Screening of applications Merit-based selection as per criteria approved by the Ministry (interviews dispensed as per DoPT guidelines)
Screening of applications Written examination (if more than 20 applications received for a post) Personal Interview before appropriate committee
Selection on contractual basis for 12 months
how_to_apply: Download the prescribed application form from the official website: www.niepid.nic.in
Fill in the form completely, clearly mentioning the post applied for and its Serial Number from the notification, along with whether it is a Regular, Contract, or CDEIC position.
Attach self-attested copies of certificates for educational qualifications, experience, caste/category, and disability (if applicable).
Prepare a Demand Draft of ₹500/- (if applicable) in favour of Director, NIEPID, Secunderabad.
Superscribe the envelope: "Application for the post of ___ (Regular/Contract/CDEIC)"
Send the completed application to: The Director, NIEPID, Manovikas Nagar, Secunderabad - 500 009
Ensure the application reaches NIEPID on or before 01 August 2026. Late or incomplete applications will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
content_sections.text: Applications received after the last date or in an incorrect format will not be considered. Candidates are advised to submit well in advance to avoid last-minute delays.

tables.caption: CDEIC Contractual Posts (Cross Disability Early Intervention Centres)

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates wondering about eligibility can note that each post carries specific educational and experience requirements. All qualifications must be from a recognized Board or University, and experience must be post-qualification. 1. Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology (Level-10) Two-year M.Phil. in Clinical/Rehabilitation Psychology from a reputed institution (NIMHANS, CIP Ranchi, NIEPID, etc.) OR Ph.D. in Child/Experimental/Community/Educational Psychology Registered with MCI/RCI Minimum 2 years teaching/research experience Age Limit: 45 years 2. Stenographer (Level-4) SSLC/Matriculation or equivalent Typewriting (English) - 40 wpm; Shorthand (English) - 100 wpm Desirable: 3 years experience; Graduate with English Age Limit: 28 years 3. LDC/Typist (Level-2) 12th class or equivalent from a recognized Board/University Typing: 35 wpm (English) or 30 wpm (Hindi) on computer; OR 30 wpm (English) or 25 wpm (Hindi) on manual typewriter Age Limit: 27 years 4. Physiotherapy Assistant (Level-2) Bachelor of Physiotherapy from a recognized college/university 1 year experience in the field of Disability Rehabilitation Age Limit: 35 years Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India norms for SC/ST/OBC/PH/Ex-Servicemen categories for regular posts. Assistant Professor in Pediatrics: MD in Pediatrics + 4 years teaching/research experience (Max Age: 56 years) Assistant Professor (PMR): MBBS + PG Degree/Diploma in PMR/Pediatrics (MCI/RCI recognised) + 2 years teaching/research (Max Age: 56 years) Assistant Professor (Speech): PG Degree in Speech and Hearing (RCI recognised) + 5 years experience (Max Age: 56 years) Assistant Professor (Clinical Psychology): M.Phil. in Clinical/Rehabilitation Psychology (RCI recognised) + 5 years experience (Max Age: 56 years) Lecturer (Occupational Therapy): Master's in Occupational Therapy + 3 years experience (Max Age: 56 years)

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Application Fee
content_sections.text: The fee must be submitted as a non-refundable Demand Draft drawn on any Nationalized Bank in favour of "Director, NIEPID, Secunderabad". Candidates must write their name and the post applied for on the back of the DD. Applications without the required DD will not be considered. Candidates applying for more than one post must submit separate application forms and separate DDs for each post.

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: NIEPID follows a structured selection process depending on post level and category. For Regular Group 'A' Posts (e.g., Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology): Screening of applications by a duly constituted Screening Committee Shortlisting (minimum 1:5 ratio per vacancy) Written Examination (if more than 20 applications received) Personal Interview For Regular Group 'B' & 'C' Posts (Stenographer, LDC/Typist, Physiotherapy Assistant): Screening of applications Merit-based selection as per criteria approved by the Ministry (interviews dispensed as per DoPT guidelines) For Contractual Posts: Screening of applications Written examination (if more than 20 applications received for a post) Personal Interview before appropriate committee For CDEIC Contractual Posts: Selection on contractual basis for 12 months, extendable based on satisfactory performance

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: Candidates selected for regular posts will be governed by the New Pension Scheme (NPS) introduced by the Government of India w.e.f. 01.01.2004. Fixed consolidated monthly remuneration is paid as per the contract. No additional allowances are admissible for contractual positions.

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Guest Faculty / Staff - Walk-in Interviews
content_sections.text: NIEPID also empanelled guest faculty/staff on a session-wise honorarium basis through walk-in interviews held across multiple centres from 23 June to 06 July 2026. Up to 4 sessions per working day (9:00 AM - 5:30 PM) Engagement period: 6 months, extendable for a further 6 months Application fee for walk-in: ₹200/- (waived for SC/ST/PH/Women) Registration: 9:00 AM - 11:30 AM on the respective date

rows.level: Special Educators / Rehabilitation Therapists / Vocational Instructors / Support Staff

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - How to Apply
content_sections.text: Download the prescribed application form from the official website: www.niepid.nic.in Fill in the form completely, clearly mentioning the post applied for and its Serial Number from the notification, along with whether it is a Regular, Contract, or CDEIC position. Attach self-attested copies of certificates for educational qualifications, experience, caste/category, and disability (if applicable). Prepare a Demand Draft of ₹500/- (if applicable) in favour of Director, NIEPID, Secunderabad. Superscribe the envelope: "Application for the post of ___ (Regular/Contract/CDEIC)" Send the completed application to: The Director, NIEPID, Manovikas Nagar, Secunderabad - 500 009 Ensure the application reaches NIEPID on or before 01 August 2026. Late or incomplete applications will not be considered.

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Required Documents Checklist
content_sections.text: Completed application form in prescribed format Self-attested copies of educational qualification certificates Experience certificates (post-qualification only) Age proof (SSLC/Birth Certificate) Caste/Category certificate in GoI prescribed format (for SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates) Valid RCI/MCI registration certificate (for applicable posts) Disability certificate (if applicable) Demand Draft (if applicable) Recent passport-size photographs

content_sections.heading: NIEPID Recruitment 2026 - Troubleshooting / Common Mistakes to Avoid
content_sections.text: These are errors that commonly lead to rejection of applications - not mentioned in the official notification but critical to know: Wrong DD payee name: Ensure the Demand Draft is drawn in favour of "Director, NIEPID, Secunderabad" - not NIEPID alone or any other variation. Missing post name on DD: Always write your name and post applied for on the reverse of the DD before submitting. Single application for multiple posts: Each post requires a separate application form and a separate DD. Combining them in one application is a common rejection reason. Unmarked envelope: The envelope must be superscribed with the post name, serial number, and type (Regular/Contract/CDEIC). Plain envelopes are often misrouted. OBC Non-Creamy Layer certificate from State Government: NIEPID requires NCL certificates valid for Central Government appointment - State-issued certificates may not be accepted. Experience counted before qualifying degree: Experience is reckoned only from the date of acquiring the minimum essential qualification. Earlier experience will not be counted. Omitting RCI/MCI registration: Posts requiring RCI/MCI registration must have a valid certificate as of the last date. Expired registrations are a common rejection trigger. Applying through proper channel: Candidates currently serving in Government/PSU/Autonomous Bodies must route their applications through proper channel - direct applications may be rejected. Incorrect category claim: OBC candidates in the Creamy Layer must apply as General/UR. Incorrect category claims may lead to disqualification even after selection.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for NIEPID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for all regular, contractual, and CDEIC posts under Employment Notice No. 03/2026 is 01 August 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in NIEPID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 6 regular posts (Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology – 2, Stenographer – 1, LDC/Typist – 2, Physiotherapy Assistant – 1) along with multiple contractual and CDEIC positions across NIEPID headquarters and its regional/composite centres.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application fee for NIEPID 2026?
faq.answer: The application fee is ₹500/- per post (non-refundable Demand Draft) for General/OBC/EWS candidates. No fee is charged from SC/ST/Women/PH category candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for NIEPID Lecturer post?
faq.answer: Selection for the Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology (Group A) involves application screening by a Screening Committee, shortlisting at a 1:5 ratio, and a Personal Interview. If more than 20 applications are received, a written examination is conducted before the interview.

faq.question: Q5. What qualifications are needed for the Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a two-year M.Phil. in Clinical/Rehabilitation Psychology from a reputed institution (or Ph.D. in relevant Psychology), valid RCI/MCI registration, and a minimum of 2 years of teaching/research experience. The upper age limit is 45 years.

faq.question: Q6. Is RCI registration mandatory for all posts?
faq.answer: No. RCI/MCI registration is mandatory only for specific posts - including Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology (regular) and several contractual/CDEIC posts such as Assistant Professor (PMR), (Speech), (Clinical Psychology), Clinical Psychologist, Occupational Therapist, ASLP, and others. Posts like Stenographer, LDC/Typist, and Pharmacist do not require RCI registration.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for NIEPID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for all regular, contractual, and CDEIC posts under Employment Notice No. 03/2026 is 01 August 2026. Applications received after this date will not be considered.

faq.question: How many vacancies are available in NIEPID Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 6 regular posts (Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology – 2, Stenographer – 1, LDC/Typist – 2, Physiotherapy Assistant – 1) along with multiple contractual and CDEIC positions across NIEPID headquarters and its regional/composite centres.

faq.answer: Selection for the Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology (Group A) involves application screening by a Screening Committee, shortlisting at a 1:5 ratio, and a Personal Interview. If more than 20 applications are received, a written examination is conducted before the interview.

faq.answer: Candidates need a two-year M.Phil. in Clinical/Rehabilitation Psychology from a reputed institution (or Ph.D. in relevant Psychology), valid RCI/MCI registration, and a minimum of 2 years of teaching/research experience. The upper age limit is 45 years.

faq.answer: No. RCI/MCI registration is mandatory only for specific posts - including Lecturer in Rehabilitation Psychology (regular) and several contractual/CDEIC posts such as Assistant Professor (PMR), (Speech), (Clinical Psychology), Clinical Psychologist, Occupational Therapist, ASLP, and others.
